title: lastrea patentissima
intro: Lastrea patentissima, also known as the Chinese Leptotis fern, is a species of fern native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Lastrea patentissima include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
